title: Login not working
description: Customer is unable to log into their account using correct credentials.

title: Payment failed at checkout
description: Transaction fails when attempting to pay with a credit card.

title: Password reset email not received
description: Customer requested password reset but did not receive the email.

title: App crashes on launch
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after opening.

title: Unable to update profile
description: Customer cannot save changes made to their profile information.

title: Incorrect billing amount
description: Customer was charged more than the displayed price.

title: Feature request: Dark mode
description: Customer suggests adding a dark mode option to the dashboard.

title: Slow loading dashboard
description: Dashboard takes too long to load after login.

title: Error 500 on reports page
description: Server error appears when accessing the reports section.

title: Subscription cancellation issue
description: Customer cannot cancel subscription from account settings.

title: Missing order confirmation
description: Customer did not receive confirmation email after placing an order.

title: Two-factor authentication issue
description: Verification code is not being accepted during login.

title: Unable to upload documents
description: File upload fails with unsupported format error even for valid files.

title: Notification settings not saving
description: Changes to email notification preferences are not being saved.

title: Search function not returning results
description: Search bar returns empty results even when items exist.
